STATUS

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0xa
Size:
0x2
Source:
dac_registers.rdl

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[15:5] - - - -
[4] dsm_locked r 0x0 -
[3:2] dacn_power rw 0x0 -
[1:0] dacp_power rw 0x0 -

Field Descriptions

dsm_locked

If 1, means delta-sigma modulator is warmed up after enable.

dacn_power

DACN power value, as described by DAC5311 datasheet.

dacp_power

DACP power value, as described by DAC5311 datasheet.
